response.justification: The candidate has extensive software engineering experience, particularly in full-stack web development with Node.js, TypeScript, and DLang. However, the role requires deep, recent expertise in C++, STL, multi-threading, and industrial cybersecurity standards (IEC 62443), which are heavily lacking in their recent work history. Their limited C++ experience dates back to a brief 7-month stint in 2014-2015, making them a poor fit for a Senior C++ Developer position in industrial automation.
strengths: Extensive overall software development experience (15+ years) with a strong track record in full-stack and distributed systems.
Possesses advantageous skills listed in the job description, including React, Node.js, and cloud infrastructure.
Demonstrated leadership in engineering practices, including TDD, CI/CD, and mentoring through workshops and dojos.
concerns: Lacks recent and extensive professional experience with C++, STL, and concurrent programming, having last used C++ professionally in 2015.
No demonstrated experience with industrial cybersecurity standards (IEC 62443) or Secure Development Lifecycle (SDL) practices.
Missing exposure to industrial automation protocols (MQTT, Modbus, OPC UA) and heavy message-broker architectures.
